# ipmi_bmc_info (Data Source)

BMC firmware identification + capabilities, parsed from `ipmitool mc info`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cipher_suite` (Number)
- `host` (String)
- `interface` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `port` (Number)
- `username` (String)

### Read-Only

- `device_available` (Boolean)
- `device_id` (Number)
- `device_revision` (Number)
- `firmware_version` (String)
- `ipmi_version` (String)
- `manufacturer_id` (Number)
- `manufacturer_name` (String)
- `product_id` (Number)
- `product_name` (String)
